title: ApprovalArtifact
description: Explicit human or machine authorization for critical actions

approver_id.description: Identity of the approver (e.g. user ID, role, or machine key)

target_hash.description: Hash of the artifact being approved (e.g. a PlanSpec hash)

scope.description: Limitations of this approval (e.g. 'execute once', 'valid for 1h')

conditions.description: If conditional, what must be met

signature.description: Cryptographic signature of the approval content
